text.operational_en: Create a path from the empty hall toward the collaborative group setting.
Continue in the broken solitary direction without an invitation.

uncertainty.operational_en: The action direction is clear; the deeper motive remains a bounded hypothesis.

text.operational_en: An empty hall is in view while the attractive collaborative scene with a group is elsewhere; the current and desired scenes clearly differ.
There is a clear impulse to approach the group.
There is a clear impulse to establish contact.
